cards.back: A distributed system is a collection of independent computers that appear to be a single coherent system to the user
Autonomy, Distribution, and Failability are the three main characteristics of distributed systems
Client-Server, Peer-to-Peer, and Hierarchical are the three main types of distributed systems
Improved fault tolerance, Increased scalability, and Enhanced performance are the main advantages of distributed systems
Increased complexity, Higher overhead, and Difficulty in debugging are the main disadvantages of distributed systems
